case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. JUAN CALLE MORALES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL--COLLECTION SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, JUAN CALLE $4,066.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,136.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, JUAN CALLE
